title: passiflora cubensis subsp. holguinensis
intro: Passiflora cubensis subsp. holguinensis, also known as the Cuban passionflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Passifloraceae family, characterized by its purple flowers and edible fruit. The plant is rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including sedative and anti-anxiety effects. The health benefits of Passiflora cubensis subsp. holguinensis include improved sleep quality, reduced stress levels, and relief from anxiety and insomnia, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting relaxation and calmness. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support mental health and well-being.
